title: ViennaRNA/xrRNA-design-code: Rational design of mechanically active RNAs: de novo engineering of functional exoribonuclease-resistant RNAs
author: Michael T. Wolfinger
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This release provides the xrRNA design framework along with scripts utilized for  in silico  validation, as developed for the study titled  "Rational design of mechanically active RNAs: de novo engineering of functional exoribonuclease-resistant RNAs"
steps_raw: This release provides the xrRNA design framework along with scripts utilized for  in silico  validation, as developed for the study titled  "Rational design of mechanically active RNAs: de novo engineering of functional exoribonuclease-resistant RNAs"
